mapper.select: SELECT chat_id, chat_type, owner_id, to_id, is_mute, is_top, sequence, read_sequence, create_time, update_time, del_flag, version FROM im_chat WHERE owner_id = #{ownerId} AND sequence > #{sequence}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO im_chat ( chat_id, chat_type, owner_id, to_id, is_mute, is_top, sequence, read_sequence, create_time, update_time, del_flag, version ) VALUES ( #{chatId}, #{chatType}, #{ownerId}, #{toId}, 0, 0, #{sequence}, 0, #{sequence}, #{sequence}, 1, 0 ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE sequence = GREATEST(sequence, VALUES(sequence)), update_time = VALUES(update_time)
